course_not_found_desc: The course you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.

delete_section_warning: Are you sure you want to delete this section? All lectures and quizzes inside will also be deleted.
delete_quiz_warning: Are you sure you want to delete this quiz?
delete_lecture_warning: Are you sure you want to delete this lecture?
video_format_limit: Supported formats: MP4, WebM, OGG, MOV, MKV
please_upload_video: Please upload a video for this lecture
please_fix_errors: Please fix all errors before continuing

sections_load_error: Could not load sections. Please refresh the page.
file_size_exceeded: File size exceeds limit of {0} MB
file_type_not_allowed: File type not allowed. Allowed types: {0}
course_exam_desc: The course exam is a final assessment for students to complete after finishing all lectures.
delete_exam_warning: Are you sure you want to delete the course exam?
no_course_exam_desc: No course exam has been created yet. Add one to provide a final assessment for your students.
no_course_resources: No course resources available. Upload files for your students to download.
delete_resource_warning: Are you sure you want to delete this resource?
resource_format_limit: Supported formats: PDF, DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX, PPT, PPTX, TXT, ZIP, Images
course_resource_format_limit: Supported formats: PDF, DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX, PPT, PPTX, TXT, ZIP, Images (max 100MB)
file_already_selected: A file is already selected. Remove it first to select another.
resource_upload_info: Your file will be uploaded and attached to this course. Students will be able to download it.
endpoint_not_found: Upload service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
file_too_large: File is too large. Please upload a smaller file.
checkPromoVideo: Add a promotional video for your course
checkDescription: Write a detailed course description (minimum 100 characters)
checkLectures: Add at least one lecture to a section
submit_request_error: Failed to submit request. Please try again.
requirements_not_met: Please complete all required items before requesting publication
request_already_pending: A publication request is already pending for this course
publish_request_submitted: Your publication request has been submitted successfully
notes_placeholder: Add any notes or information for the reviewer...
pending_review_desc: Your course is currently under review. You'll be notified once it's approved.
rejected_desc: Your publication request was rejected. Please review the feedback and make necessary changes.
changes_requested_desc: Changes have been requested. Please update your course accordingly and resubmit.
remove_promo_video_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove the promotional video?
promo_video_endpoint_missing: Promotional video upload service is not available

no_promo_video_hint: Upload a video to showcase your course
